mapper.insert: INSERT INTO memory_comments (memory_id, writer_id, content) VALUES (#{memoryId}, #{writerId}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.memory_id, c.writer_id, u.nickname AS writer_nickname, u.profile_image_url AS writer_profile_image_url, c.content, c.created_at FROM memory_comments c JOIN users u ON u.id = c.writer_id WHERE c.id = #{commentId}

SELECT c.id, c.memory_id, c.writer_id, u.nickname AS writer_nickname, u.profile_image_url AS writer_profile_image_url, c.content, c.created_at FROM memory_comments c JOIN users u ON u.id = c.writer_id WHERE c.memory_id = #{memoryId} ORDER BY c.created_at ASC, c.id ASC
